why: B mandates consistent 2-or-4-space indent with no mixed tabs/spaces, matching the no-tabs/consistent-width intent.

rule: Keys in a stable order when hand-authoring (group
why: B only requires preserving/not-reordering existing input key order, not a hand-authoring convention of grouping keys with ids first.

rule: No trailing commas (JSON forbids them); no comments
why: B separately bans trailing commas and requires flagging/stripping comments in non-standard JSON, covering both prohibitions.

rule: Dates as ISO-8601 strings; avoid epoch integers in
why: B has no rule anywhere about date representation, ISO-8601 formatting, or epoch integers.

rule: For diffs, pretty-print both sides with the same
why: B's determinism and diff-friendliness rules require stable, consistent formatting so diffs show only real changes, same underlying intent.
